category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Malbolge as a deliberately difficult esoteric programming language.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description uses the project name Malbolge.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official README text used as the project documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty and source_facts.source-archive points to a standalone malbolge.c file, not an official source-control repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states it is an esoteric programming language.
source_facts.executables lists the malbolge command-line executable.
